title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama for local LLM chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, Spring Boot starters, and Android support.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-style code-completion engine for VS Code.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper with fuzzy model search, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host a Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model with slash commands.

title: ollama-nest
summary: NestJS module that exposes Ollama as an injectable service with decorators for streaming and embeddings.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate offering async/await bindings to the Ollama REST API with serde models.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama sidecars in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-gpt4all-importer
summary: Convert GPT4All model binaries into Ollama Modelfile format for easy local usage.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with IAsyncEnumerable streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that brings local LLM completion & summarization via Ollama to your notes.
